//: Expo's tsconfig.base is inlined here (instead of `extends: expo/tsconfig.base`) so this file is self-contained. A few WEB vitest suites import real mobile TypeScript (e.g. mobile/lib/permissions.ts) and the web CI job installs root deps only, not the expo tree; an unresolvable package-extends crashed the whole web suite. These options mirror expo/tsconfig.base verbatim; keep them in sync if the Expo SDK base changes.
